message:
fix(core): NATURAL JOIN and JOIN USING deduplicate shared columns in SELECT * (#93)

SELECT * with NATURAL JOIN or JOIN...USING was including duplicate columns
from the right table. Per SQL standard, shared/coalesced columns should
appear only once. Built using_skip_indices set from join constraints to
filter right-table USING columns from both column expansion and row
projection.

Also adds 6 new conformance test suites: nested triggers, SELECT without
FROM, complex UPDATE WHERE, NATURAL JOIN, JOIN USING, COUNT(*) vs COUNT(col).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
